title: salix × hirsutophylla
intro: Salix × hirsutophylla is a hybrid willow species, resulting from the cross between Salix hirsuta and Salix phylicifolia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Salix × hirsutophylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Salix × hirsutophylla is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
